notes: IEEE 1584-2018 incident-energy model -> NFPA 70E PPE category. Inputs: v_oc (V), i_bf_kA (kA), gap_mm (mm), electrode config, enclosure_mm (HxWxD mm), working_distance_mm (mm), arc_time_s (s).
Tolerances: incident energy +/-0.05 cal/cm2; arc-flash boundary +/-10 mm; PPE category EXACT (no tolerance).
Reference time = 0.2 s; bare-skin boundary energy Eb = 1.2 cal/cm2 (5.0 J/cm2).

Coefficients are the GENUINE IEEE 1584-2018 standard, transcribed from the owner-supplied licensed copy (Maple Flow worked implementation: hse-skills-screenshot/acrflashcalculation_iee1584-2018_final.pdf). The re-implementation (D-01) closes todo 260621-p11-arcflash-coefficients-licensed-verify; the engine reproduces the PDF's fully-worked HCB switchgear example and its published intermediate values.

AF-HCB is the PDF's authoritative published worked example (HCB, 13.8 kV): E ~ 8.89 cal/cm2 (37.217 J/cm2 internal), AFB ~ 3037 mm, PPE category 3. It is the gold-standard anchor that proves the genuine model is correct.

AF-1/AF-2 are the two 400 V VCB cases retained from Phase-11. The genuine IEEE 1584-2018 model (validated 208 V-15 kV) extrapolates these below its 600 V reference floor and yields E = 2.41 / 1.67 cal/cm2 (PPE category 1) -- DIFFERENT from the Phase-11 surrogate's 0.85 / 0.62 cal/cm2 (which mapped to category 0). The surrogate values were never genuine-model outputs; the expected values here are the genuine IEEE 1584-2018 model's, recomputed by the re-implemented engine. The previous category-0 mapping is superseded by the authoritative model.

VCBB/VOA/HOA cases are clearly-labelled ENGINE REGRESSION ANCHORS computed by the re-stamped engine on a documented input set -- NOT independent published worked examples (no fabricated published provenance, OQ3). They guard against future structural/unit regressions across the three configs the PDF does not fully work.

Range-invalid / must-raise cases (v_oc 50 V below 208 floor, v_oc 20 kV above 15 kV ceiling, negative gap) live in test_arcflash.py per D-03 (raise ArcFlashInputError, never clamp), not in this fixture.

cases.provenance: IEEE 1584-2018 published worked example (licensed PDF, fully worked HCB switchgear case): Iarc 16.31 kA, VarCf 0.023, CF 1.177 (EES 50.882 mm), E_600/2700/14300 = 20.503/32.178/37.444 J/cm2, E (interp) 37.217 J/cm2 = 8.89 cal/cm2; AFB_600/2700/14300 = 1817/2667/3054 mm, AFB (interp) 3037 mm. Authoritative anchor.
cases.why: The gold-standard anchor proving the genuine IEEE 1584-2018 model: E 8.89 cal/cm2 in the 8-25 band -> PPE category 3.

cases.provenance: Engine value from the genuine IEEE 1584-2018 model (VCB, 400 V switchboard, extrapolated below the 600 V reference floor). Supersedes the Phase-11 surrogate's 0.85 cal/cm2 (category 0), which was not a genuine-model output.
cases.why: Genuine-model VCB 400 V case: E 2.41 cal/cm2 in the 1.2-4 band -> PPE category 1 (was category 0 under the superseded surrogate).

cases.provenance: Engine value from the genuine IEEE 1584-2018 model (VCB, 400 V distribution switchboard). Supersedes the Phase-11 surrogate's 0.62 cal/cm2 (category 0).
cases.why: Genuine-model VCB 400 V case: E 1.67 cal/cm2 in the 1.2-4 band -> PPE category 1 (was category 0 under the superseded surrogate).

cases.provenance: ENGINE REGRESSION ANCHOR, not an independent published example: computed by the re-stamped IEEE 1584-2018 engine on the documented input (VCBB, 4.16 kV, 15 kA, 104 mm gap, 455 mm WD, 0.2 s, 1244.6/1244.6/1143 mm box). Guards the VCBB config path against structural/unit regression.
cases.why: Regression anchor for the VCBB config (8-25 band -> PPE category 3).

cases.provenance: ENGINE REGRESSION ANCHOR, not an independent published example: computed by the re-stamped IEEE 1584-2018 engine on the documented input (VOA open-air, 4.16 kV, 15 kA, 104 mm gap, 455 mm WD, 0.2 s, no enclosure -> CF = 1). Guards the open-air VOA config path against regression.
cases.why: Regression anchor for the VOA (open-air) config (4-8 band -> PPE category 2).

cases.provenance: ENGINE REGRESSION ANCHOR, not an independent published example: computed by the re-stamped IEEE 1584-2018 engine on the documented input (HOA open-air, 4.16 kV, 15 kA, 104 mm gap, 455 mm WD, 0.2 s, no enclosure -> CF = 1). Guards the open-air HOA config path against regression.
cases.why: Regression anchor for the HOA (open-air) config (8-25 band -> PPE category 3).
